description: Group Management events report management updates to a group, including updates to membership and permissions.

group.caption: group
group.description: Group that was the target of the event.

privileges.caption: privileges
privileges.description: A list of privileges assigned to the group.

resource.caption: resource
resource.description: Resource that the privileges give access to.

subgroup.caption: subgroup
subgroup.description: A subgroup that was added to or removed from the group.

user.caption: user
user.description: A user that was added to or removed from the group.
